title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 1-11: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance - Collateral standard: Requirements for medical electrical equipment and medical electrical systems used in the home healthcare environment
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第1-11部分：基本安全和基本性能的通用要求 - 并列标准：家用医疗设备和家用医疗系统的要求

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for medical electrical equipment and systems used in the home healthcare environment.
standards.scope: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance -- Collateral standard: Requirements for medical electrical equipment and medical electrical systems used in the home healthcare environment.
